mainHtml:
Resources / Download center
DOWNLOAD CENTER

Engineering files & manufacturing templates

For R&D, procurement, quality and project management teams, sort out the quotation communication of precision parts, Standardized documentation required for DFM review, material selection, drawing specification, quality acceptance and delivery of materials. Through the unified data template, we can reduce omissions in early communication and improve the efficiency of quotation and project advancement.

Browse downloads Review FAQ
Templates Quotation and Project Profile Templates
Checklists DFM, Quality & Delivery Checklist
Guides Material, process and design specifications
DOCUMENT SYSTEM

Make quotation, design review and acceptance materials more standard

The download center covers the key materials from the early quotation of the project to the late acceptance and delivery, Helps you quickly prepare drawings, models, material requirements, tolerance instructions, surface treatment requirements, and quality documentation requirements.

See all profiles→
01 Quotation Data Preparation Submit drawings, models, quantities, materials, surface treatments and delivery requirements.
02 DFM Design Review Check the wall thickness, tolerances, rounded corners, deep cavities, clamping and tool accessibility in advance.
03 Quality Acceptance Documents Unified first-piece inspection, dimensional records, material certification and shipment acceptance data.
04 Material Process Reference Contrast material properties, machining limitations, surface treatments and cost differences.
DOWNLOAD FILES

downloads

Filter required materials by quotation, design, material, quality, and delivery scenario. The download link below currently uses the placeholder file path, which can be replaced with the real PDF, XLSX, or DOCX file address when officially launched.

Can't find what you're looking for?→
A total of 9 materials
QUOTE PDF

Quotation Material Preparation List

Organize 3D models, 2D drawings, materials, quantities, Surface treatment, critical tolerance and delivery information to help quickly complete the machining assessment.

Applicable: Procurement/R&D About 2 pages
Download Data File↓
DFM PDF

DFM Manufacturability Checklist

Covers common wall thicknesses, rounded corners, deep grooves, reverse buckles, tolerances, Clamping datum and tool accessibility checks, suitable for quick self-inspection before production.

Application: Structural design/craftsmanship About 4 pages
Download Data File ↓
DRAWING PDF

Engineering drawings annotation specification reference

Summarize the dimensional datum, cavities, threads, surface roughness, Shape tolerances and common expressions of technical requirements reduce drawings ambiguity.

Applicable: R&D/Design About 6 pages
Download Data File ↓
MATERIAL XLSX

Common Material Parameters Comparison Table

Compare the density of aluminum alloy, stainless steel, titanium alloy, carbon steel, copper and engineering plastics, Strength, corrosion resistance, cutting performance and typical application scenarios.

Applies to: Selection/Procurement Document Excel
Download Data File ↓
FINISH PDF

Surface treatment selection table

Combing suitable materials for anodic oxidation, electroplating, spraying, passivation, blackening, polishing and other processes, Appearance effects, film thickness range and typical usage scenarios.

Application: Appearance/Anticorrosion About 5 pages
Download Data File ↓
QUALITY XLSX

First Test Report Template

Used to record the size of the first piece, tolerances, testing tools, measured values, determination results and confirmation signatures, Suitable for sample trial production and quality confirmation before mass production.

Applicable: Quality/Production Document Excel
Download Data File ↓
INSPECTION PDF

Batch Acceptance Data List

Organize batch orders Common material certificates, dimensional inspection records, surface treatment reports, CMM Reporting, Packing List and Delivery Document Requirements.

Applicable: Quality Inspection/Procurement About 3 pages
Download Data File ↓
MODEL PDF

3D Model Format Submission Specification

Describe applicable scenarios in common three-dimensional formats such as step, IGES, STL, OBJ, etc., and the units, proportions, versions, and feature completeness that need to be taken into account when submitting the model.

Applies to: R&D/Model Submission About 3 pages
Download Data File ↓
PROJECT DOCX

Project Requirement Description Template

It is used to uniformly describe the working conditions of parts, assembly relationships, load requirements, material preferences, Quantity Stages, Delivery Nodes, Packaging and Logistics Requirements.

Applies to: Project/Procurement Document templates
Download Data File ↓
No information found Try changing the category or searching for a different keyword.
HOW TO USE

How do I use these downloads?

It is recommended to complete the preparation of information before project communication, especially the documents related to quotation, DFM review and quality acceptance.

01

Pre-quotation preparation

Download the prepared list of quotation materials to collate drawings, models, quantities, materials and surface treatment requirements.

02

Pre-design self-check

Use the DFM checklist and drawings to label specifications to identify wall thickness, tolerances and mounting risks in advance.

03

Comparison of materials and processes

Compare the material parameters and surface treatment table to confirm the performance, cost and machining feasibility of the parts.

04

Quality Delivery Confirmation

Use the first report template and the acceptance data list to clarify the test documents and shipment data requirements.

When the data is ready, do you need to further evaluate the processing plan?

Upload drawings, models and project requirements for materials, workmanship, quotes and delivery suggestions.

Quote now
